THOMAS Corbet (-before 2 Nov 1274).  "…Thomas, Hugh and Robert the grantor’s sons…" w …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Corbet於大約1182年出生在英國史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴時，他的父親Sir Robert Corbet11180歲，母親Emma de Pantulf22歲。他於1218年與Isabella de Valletort在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1248年被列為sheriff of staffordshire。他去世於1274年9月6日在他的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Corbet于大约1182年出生在英国史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴时，他的父亲Sir Robert Corbet11180岁，母亲Emma de Pantulf22岁。他于1218年与Isabella de Valletort在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1248年被列为sheriff of staffordshire。他去世于1274年9月6日在他的家乡享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Corbet was born about 1182, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Corbet, was 11180 and his mother, Emma de Pantulf, was 22. He married Isabella de Valletort in 1218, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. In 1248, at the age of 67, his occupation is listed as sheriff of staffordshire. He died on 6 September 1274, in his hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Corbet est né environ 1182, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Corbet, avait 11180 ans et sa mère, Emma de Pantulf, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Valletort en 1218, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. En 1248, à l’âge de 67 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of staffordshire. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Bath Abbey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Abbey Church Of Saint Peter And Saint Pa: Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Corbet um 1182 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Corbet 11180 und seine Mutter Emma de Pantulf 22. Er hat 1218 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Isabella de Valletort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1248, als er 67 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of staffordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. September 1274 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabella de Valletort nel 1218, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Nel 1248, all'età di 67 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of staffordshire. Morì il 6 settembre 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Corbetが約1182年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Corbetは11180歳，母Emma de Pantulfは22歳であった。1218年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでIsabella de Valletortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。1248年，67歳の時，職業はsheriff of staffordshireと記録されている。彼は1274年9月6日に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Corbet(이)가 대략 1182년 영국 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Corbet(은)는 11180세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Pantulf(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Isabella de Valletort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1248년, 67세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of staffordshire이었다. 그는 1274년 9월 6일 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Corbet, tinha 11180 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Pantulf, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Valletort em 1218, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Em 1248, com 67 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of staffordshire. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1274, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Corbet родился около 1182 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Corbet было 11180 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Pantulf, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Valletort в 1218 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1248 году, в возрасте 67 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of staffordshire. Он умер 6 сентября 1274 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности бат эбби, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabella de Valletort en 1218, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. En 1248, a la edad de 67 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of staffordshire. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1274, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
